title: Shopping Cart
subtitle: Immutability, Context API, and reducer pattern for application-wide cart state
prerequisites: day10 — product models, list rendering, and immutable array patterns
week1 — useState, props, and component composition
expectedOutcome: Update cart state immutably with spread and map/filter
Type CartItem and CartState with TypeScript
Share cart state across components with Context API
Manage cart logic with useReducer and action types
Build add, remove, quantity, total, and empty cart UI
definitionOfDone: Add product to cart from product listing
Increase and decrease quantity with minimum of 1 or remove at 0
Cart persists across route navigation via Context

tomorrowPreview.title: User Profile & Dynamic Routing
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will build dynamic routes with URL params and user profile pages — connecting cart and catalog through navigation.
